scripts.emulators: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const os=require('os');const path=require('path');const{spawnSync}=require('child_process');function run(cmd,args,opts){const r=spawnSync(cmd,args,{stdio:'inherit',...opts});if(r.error)throw r.error;if(r.status!==0)process.exit(r.status??1);}function ensureJava17(){const v=spawnSync('java',['-version'],{encoding:'utf8'});const txt=String(v.stderr||v.stdout||'');const m=txt.match(/version \"(\d+)/);const major=m?Number(m[1]):NaN;if(Number.isFinite(major)&&major<=17)return null;const cache=path.join(os.homedir(),'.cache','firebase-java');const javaHome=path.join(cache,'jre17');const javaBin=path.join(javaHome,'bin','java');if(!fs.existsSync(javaBin)){fs.mkdirSync(cache,{recursive:true});fs.mkdirSync(javaHome,{recursive:true});const tgz=path.join(cache,'jre17.tgz');run('curl',['-fsSL','-o',tgz,'https://api.adoptium.net/v3/binary/latest/17/ga/linux/x64/jre/hotspot/normal/adoptium']);run('tar',['-xzf',tgz,'-C',javaHome,'--strip-components=1']);}return javaHome;}const jh=ensureJava17();const env={...process.env};const extraNoProxy='127.0.0.1,localhost,::1';env.NO_PROXY=env.NO_PROXY?extraNoProxy+','+env.NO_PROXY:extraNoProxy;env.no_proxy=env.no_proxy?extraNoProxy+','+env.no_proxy:extraNoProxy;if(jh){env.JAVA_HOME=jh;env.PATH=path.join(jh,'bin')+':'+env.PATH;}const res=spawnSync('firebase',['emulators:start','--only','auth,database,storage'],{stdio:'inherit',env});process.exit(res.status??1);"
scripts.test:emulators: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const os=require('os');const path=require('path');const{spawnSync}=require('child_process');function run(cmd,args,opts){const r=spawnSync(cmd,args,{stdio:'inherit',...opts});if(r.error)throw r.error;if(r.status!==0)process.exit(r.status??1);}function ensureJava17(){const v=spawnSync('java',['-version'],{encoding:'utf8'});const txt=String(v.stderr||v.stdout||'');const m=txt.match(/version \"(\d+)/);const major=m?Number(m[1]):NaN;if(Number.isFinite(major)&&major<=17)return null;const cache=path.join(os.homedir(),'.cache','firebase-java');const javaHome=path.join(cache,'jre17');const javaBin=path.join(javaHome,'bin','java');if(!fs.existsSync(javaBin)){fs.mkdirSync(cache,{recursive:true});fs.mkdirSync(javaHome,{recursive:true});const tgz=path.join(cache,'jre17.tgz');run('curl',['-fsSL','-o',tgz,'https://api.adoptium.net/v3/binary/latest/17/ga/linux/x64/jre/hotspot/normal/adoptium']);run('tar',['-xzf',tgz,'-C',javaHome,'--strip-components=1']);}return javaHome;}const jh=ensureJava17();const env={...process.env};const extraNoProxy='127.0.0.1,localhost,::1';env.NO_PROXY=env.NO_PROXY?extraNoProxy+','+env.NO_PROXY:extraNoProxy;env.no_proxy=env.no_proxy?extraNoProxy+','+env.no_proxy:extraNoProxy;if(jh){env.JAVA_HOME=jh;env.PATH=path.join(jh,'bin')+':'+env.PATH;}const res=spawnSync('firebase',['emulators:exec','--only','auth,database,storage','npm test'],{stdio:'inherit',env});process.exit(res.status??1);"
